channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: African devs waste time on GitHub stars? Do this
item.description: Show one deployed project, not green squares. Remote hiring managers in 2026 judge African devs by production-ready systems, not GitHub stars. Build it in Python 3.11, FastAPI, Redis 7.2, deploy for $12/month.

item.title: RAG in prod: what tutorials won’t tell you
item.description: Cut RAG latency 78% and AWS costs 35% with a two-tier FAISS + PostgreSQL system. Learn the cache invalidation, CDC and memory traps tutorials skip.

item.title: 8 DB pool size mistakes killing your CPU
item.description: Cut connection wait time 50% by sizing pool to concurrency ceiling, not threads — with Node 20, Python 3.11 and PostgreSQL 16 benchmarks and exact formulas.

item.title: AI salaries 2026: the 3 skills that moved the needle
item.description: Cut AI salary offers 30% by proving model reliability — MLOps observability beats fine-tuning in 2026. Real salary data, concrete numbers, and the exact skills that moved the needle.

item.title: 2026 remote pay: beat the PPP trap
item.description: 2026 remote salary negotiation: use Levels.fyi and FX math to raise offers 76–118% from lower-cost countries.

item.title: CircleCI beats GitHub Actions at 50k builds
item.description: At 50k builds/month GitHub Actions costs $1,800 vs CircleCI $1,350 — here’s the real breakdown with Python 3.11 and Node 20 LTS benchmarks, caching wins, and the storage trap that surprises teams.

item.title: Pool size wrong? DB pays
item.description: Cut database connection overhead 50% by tuning pool size to query latency, not CPU cores — with real benchmarks from PostgreSQL 15, Node.js 20 LTS, and Go 1.21 in 2026

item.title: 2026 AI skills that increase pay
item.description: AI skills that pay 35% more in 2026 — the only two stacks that move the needle on salary, with concrete latency, cost, and audit data.

item.title: Senior devs flee big tech (not for money)
item.description: Cut big tech attrition 60%: meeting load, cycle time, and promotion velocity metrics that actually matter in 2026.

item.title: Ship GitHub, not a portfolio
item.description: Land remote jobs faster by making GitHub your portfolio — real projects, clean READMEs, and live demos beat polished portfolio sites every time.

item.title: Turn COP into USD: remote pay hacks
item.description: Turn your cost of living into higher pay with a data-driven negotiation playbook used by engineers in Colombia, Mexico, and Brazil — includes scripts, spreadsheets, and email templates.

item.title: Break RAG pipelines in prod
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 90% and AWS bill 98% using BM25 + reranker + cache — the staging-to-prod playbook most tutorials skip

item.title: Ship faster with a paved road: 4 weeks to 80% less toil
item.description: Ship 80% faster with a paved road: 4-week plan cuts merge-to-prod time from 30 min to 4 min, cuts on-call pages 75%, and drops infra cost 39% per 1k API requests.

item.title: 5 signs you’re done with big tech
item.description: One joined a Series B startup for 30 % less pay, the other moved to a government digital team.

item.title: Price your remote salary: 4-step script
item.description: Price your remote salary in 4 steps using Numbeo COL and volatility buffers — exact formulas, Google Sheets template, and Python 3.11 script included.

item.title: RAG in prod: 7 hard lessons tutorials skip
item.description: Cut RAG latency 85% and costs 36% with CDC, Qdrant, and ONNX — the pipeline tricks tutorials skip. Real numbers, real stack, real mistakes.

item.title: AI skills 2026: which ones pay — and which don’t
item.description: AI skills 2026 salaries revealed: integration pays $155k–$195k, fine-tuning pays $175k–$250k — but only if you avoid common pitfalls and measure ROI in weeks, not months.

item.title: Ship real work, not polished READMEs
item.description: Prove you can run systems, not write code — 3 real portfolio projects that got interviews vs ones that didn’t, with IaC, observability and cost data from 2026

item.title: Multi-agent systems break first
item.description: After switching to Fargate with 0.25 vCPU and 512MB RAM ephemeral containers, we cut costs by 78%.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay from low-cost countries
item.description: Raise your remote rate 21% with a 37-line Python script that converts your local cost into USD and builds a finance-ready PDF—no Delaware C-corp required.
